from __future__ import annotations

import tempfile
from pathlib import Path


def python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_temporary_directory_not_cleaned_promptly_positive(payload):
    temp_dir = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp(prefix="fixture-"))
    (temp_dir / "payload.txt").write_text(payload, encoding="utf-8")
    return str(temp_dir)
